message:
Refactor codegen into modular structure and fix bugs

Refactoring:
- Split src/codegen.zig (1924 lines → 1068 lines, 44% reduction)
- Created src/codegen/builtins.zig (231 lines) - Built-in function handlers
- Created src/codegen/classes.zig (286 lines) - Class support
- Created src/codegen/operators.zig (163 lines) - Operator handling
- Total: 1748 lines across 4 focused modules vs 1924 in one file

Benefits:
- Multiple contributors can work simultaneously without conflicts
- Easier navigation and code comprehension
- Clearer separation of concerns (builtins vs classes vs operators)

Bug Fixes:
- Fixed class instance variable declarations (removed unnecessary 'var' for struct instances)
- Optimized print() with string constants to use raw strings directly (no PyObject allocation)

Test Status: 13-15 passing tests (minor flakiness, investigating)
